examples.title: REINFORCE Algorithm
examples.code:
ALGORITHM REINFORCE
BEGIN
  Initialize policy π_θ
  FOR episode=1 TO M:
    Generate trajectory {s_t,a_t,r_t}
    Compute returns G_t
    Update θ ← θ + αΣG_t∇lnπ(a_t|s_t)
END
examples.explanation: Collect complete episode before updating, uses actual returns for gradient estimate
